narrative: I noticed a critical Neo4j authentication failure in my memory architecture, preventing cross-session knowledge graph updates via Mem0. My inspection also revealed five agents (desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, reasoning_methods) lack versioned prompts, violating our self-improvement protocols. This creates instability in team coordination and historical context retention. My self-improvement cycle is currently blocked as no proposals address these configuration gaps, despite persistent memory systems being operational. These discrepancies directly impact my ability to maintain consistent, evolving agent capabilities.
